name: aria-knowledge
description: ARIA — Applied Reasoning and Insight Architecture. Persistent human-governed knowledge for Antigravity via a five-phase lifecycle: capture → govern → promote → apply → refresh. Stages session insights/decisions/feedback into review backlogs, promotes approved items to a tag-indexed markdown base, and applies them via /context, /rules, /codemap, /stitch, /distill, and Rule 22 change-decision hooks on every Edit/Write.
